name: appwrite-claude-marketplace
description: AI coding-agent skills, hooks, and conventions tuned for Appwrite/Utopia/Swoole workflows. Supports Claude Code and OpenAI Codex CLI (AGENTS.md symlinks to CLAUDE.md). Enforces conventional commits and regression-test discipline, catches Swoole pool/coroutine bugs, accelerates multi-repo work with parallel subagent fanout, and compresses Utopia framework context into every session.

plugins.name: appwrite-hooks
plugins.description: PreToolUse hooks that enforce conventional commits, regression tests for fixes, format-and-lint before commit, and block --no-verify / --amend footguns

plugins.name: appwrite-skills
plugins.description: Slash commands for parallel subagent fanout, Swoole/coroutine auditing, and intent-aware merge conflict resolution

plugins.name: appwrite-conventions
plugins.description: Appwrite ecosystem coding conventions covering backend (PHP/Utopia/Swoole), frontend (SvelteKit Console with Svelte 5 runes, bun tooling, @appwrite.io/pink design system), and infrastructure (Terraform with DigitalOcean/Cloudflare/Kubernetes/Helm providers). Frontend section grounded in the real AGENTS.md from the appwrite/console repo. Auto-loaded as CLAUDE.md, plus utopia-patterns and swoole-expert on-demand reference skills.

plugins.name: utopia-experts
plugins.description: 50 expert-level skill references — one per utopia-php library — loaded as on-demand context for Appwrite-stack work. Each skill captures public API, core patterns, gotchas, and leverage opportunities sourced from deep research across the utopia-php org.
